_meta: Curated MODEL SURVEY wishlist. The VALIDATE phase copies this to $SURVEY_DIR/manifest.json after intersecting with the live checkpoint list and dry-run loadability check. Per-category seeds are fixed in generate.sh (1000+index) so every model sees identical noise → comparable. Resolutions: SD1.5 768×512, SDXL 1216×832; LIGHTNING uses few steps + low cfg.
